nodes.label: 40-D porthole projection
nodes.rationale: One seed-frozen Gaussian projection per source into the frozen 40-D input width, applied identically to every learner; the discipline that lets any arena enter Arm A.

nodes.label: FLOOR criterion (informative-cell cut)
nodes.rationale: A cell is FLOOR (grey, uninformative) if ceiling < chance+5δ, or all learners < chance+2δ, or on a real stream none beats no-change+δ. Two-sided: the paired OURS-vs-field delta is still annotated so a FLOOR can't hide a loss.

nodes.label: The three reviewer strikes
nodes.rationale: 'Isn't this just SLDA?' (→P11.1), 'Toy data' (→P11.2-4), 'Does it scale?' (→P11.5-6); the structure Phase 11 was built to answer.

nodes.label: 3-agent lab-manager review ledger
nodes.rationale: Red-team + repo-fit + literature/stats reviewers, 23 findings (2 blockers, 4 repo-reality traps) all adjudicated and folded into the spec before running.

nodes.label: Balanced accuracy / prequential read
nodes.rationale: Mean per-class recall, replacing plain accuracy where class imbalance >3:1 (covertype 10:1); the accuracy channel on real streams is prequential (pre-update) balanced accuracy, pinned so no post-hoc metric choice.

nodes.label: 5-Datasets protocol (Ebrahimi et al., ECCV 2020)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 2003.09553; the cross-dataset protocol P11.4 adapts as a 3-block class-IL 30-way variant (harder than the field's task-IL).

nodes.label: ELEC2 no-change trap (Souza et al. 2020)
nodes.rationale: Label autocorrelation makes a persistence classifier near-unbeatable → the no-change baseline is mandatory on every real stream; a cell that can't beat persistence renders FLOOR.

nodes.label: Gas drift dataset (Vergara 2012)
nodes.rationale: The gas sensor-drift benchmark anchor; numbers transcribed at bench before the runs.

nodes.label: Gas limitations paper (Dennler et al. 2022)
nodes.rationale: Published limitations of the gas dataset, cited preemptively; balanced accuracy + a per-batch composition table respond to it.

nodes.label: CL scenarios + anchor (van de Ven, Nat MI 2022)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 1904.07734 / Nat MI 2022 + the official implementation's published Split-MNIST ER band as the instrument-validation anchor (the anchor guard).

nodes.label: Fair budgeted fight / strong-ER (Prabhu CVPR'23)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 2303.11165; the fair budgeted fight + strong-ER convention carried from P10, ER re-tuned per arena.

nodes.label: Stream throughput read (Ghunaim CVPR'23)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 2302.01047; the critical-rate/skip-fraction read P11.7 computes (the learner with higher per-sample cost saturates first).

nodes.label: Deep SLDA (Hayes & Kanan 2020)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 1909.01520; the frozen-backbone + closed-form streaming LDA head convention that matches the bulk+namer split.

nodes.label: RanPAC (McDonnell et al. 2023)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 2307.02251; random-projection + running-Gram ridge prototype namer, the frozen-backbone convention.

nodes.label: Wild-Time Yearbook (Yao et al., NeurIPS'22)
nodes.rationale: arXiv 2211.14238; real vision drift 1930-2013, the declared bonus vision leg (did not fetch — openml API down).

hyperedges.label: The three reviewer strikes answered by Phase 11 (decomposition, real data, scale)
